title: indulgent briny polish broccoli pilaf
description: a hearty, spring-inspired polish dish featuring vibrant purple sprouting broccoli and a rich, briny sauce, adapted for a jain-friendly kitchen
instructions: in a medium saucepan, toast the cashews over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring frequently
in a large saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil, then add the quinoa and reduce heat to low, simmering for 15 minutes or until the water is absorbed
in a blender or food processor, combine the lemon juice, apple cider vinegar, garlic, and dill, blending until smooth
in a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat, then add the broccoli and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
add the toasted cashews to the skillet with the broccoli, cooking for an additional 2 minutes
stir in the quinoa, garlic-dill sauce, and salt, then serve warm
garnish with extra dill and lemon wedges, if desired
